Project Brew — Demo

Multi-tenant café operations platform. Pick a surface to explore.

Customer app (PWA)

Phone+OTP login, menu, cart, UPI checkout, order tracking, loyalty.

POS + KDS

Counter order entry and the live Kitchen Display Screen.

Global admin

Head-office: org/catalog/RBAC/loyalty/procurement/reporting/privacy.

Self-contained demo on GitHub Pages — the customer app and POS/KDS run on seeded in-memory data, no backend needed. (Point them at a live API by setting the BREW_API repo variable and disabling demo mode.) Auth in demo: any phone, OTP 000000.
